description_long: This is a plush, cartoonish stuffed toy resembling a blue penguin with exaggerated features. Its body is predominantly blue with a large, rounded orange beak and matching orange feet. The toy has two small, white, circular eyes with black pupils, and a white patch on its face and belly. The wings are stylized and angular, extending outward from the sides of its body. The overall design is playful and geometric, with a soft, huggable appearance suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A blue, cartoon-style penguin stuffed toy with a large orange beak, orange feet, and white facial and belly patches. Its playful, geometric design makes it visually appealing and huggable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the penguin's face, large orange beak, white belly, and both eyes clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding beak, angular wing, and one visible eye.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid blue back and the tips of the orange feet.
description_view_3: Right side view with the beak, wing, and a partial view of the face and belly.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with wide, round eyes and a closed beak, giving it a calm and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both wings slightly out to the sides and feet flat on the ground.
